rationale: max_depth=7 has consistently delivered the best results (Brier=0.185762, Δ=-0.000251) across multiple experiments (58, 61, 62). Combined with n_estimators=800 (which also improved performance in exp 56, 59), this represents the most reliable improvement path. Deeper trees (7-8) outperform the baseline (6), suggesting the model benefits from increased complexity for temporal generalization.
